dialog.title: Map viewer
dialog.excludedUnresolved: {count} spawn(s) could not be matched to a zone

states.imageError: Failed to load the map image
states.noneOnSupportedMaps: No spawn on a supported map (Eastern Kingdoms / Kalimdor)
states.unavailableHint: This zone is not calibrated yet. Open #/map-viewer/calibrate to calibrate it.

pin.offMap: Outside the map image (clamped to the edge)

calibrate.title: Zone map calibration
calibrate.intro: Pick a zone, capture two diagonal reference points on the image, enter their world coordinates (e.g. from the game_tele table or .gps in game), then compute. Paste the exported snippet into data/zone-calibration.ts to commit it.
calibrate.exportHint: Paste this line into BAKED_CALIBRATIONS in src/modules/map_viewer/data/zone-calibration.ts

errors.incomplete: Both reference points need a captured position and world coordinates.
errors.sameWorld: The two reference points must differ on both world axes — pick two diagonal landmarks.
errors.samePixel: The two clicked positions are too close on the image — pick two diagonal landmarks.
errors.signWarning: Unexpected orientation: check that World X and World Y were not swapped (.gps prints X then Y).
